items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0-Beta-10 Available
items.message:
v3.0.0-Beta-10 is now available in pre-releases.

The update_all configurator no longer requires update_all to be run once before use. MiSTer Companion now prepares the required configuration files automatically when needed, making setup smoother for first-time use.

SaveManager has also been improved to automatically create the saves and savestates folders on the MiSTer if they are missing, preventing errors or crashes when using Backup, Restore, or Sync.

You can download the latest pre-release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
